items.title: Amazon RDS now supports up to four storage modifications in 24 hours

items.title: AWS Lambda announces self-managed code storage
items.snippet: AWS Lambda now supports self-managed Amazon S3 buckets for code storage, enabling you to reference source code directly from your own S3 buckets without Lambda creating intermediate copies. This eliminates code storage limits and reduces function activation…
